name: Mohammad Raditia Pradana
about: I am a Researcher at the SMART CITY, Universitas Indonesia, with a background in Geography and expertise in geospatial analytics. My research focuses on urban issues using geospatial tools and data-driven approaches, including GIS, street-view imagery, and other spatial datasets. I apply these methods to analyze urban environments, planning challenges, and environmental dynamics, aiming to generate insights that support more sustainable, resilient, and evidence-based urban development.
